intro_sentences.en: Let's study the simple future of to make.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar o futuro simples de fazer.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el futuro simple de hacer.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le futur simple de faire.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to make is used for creation and results.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo fazer é usado para criação e resultados.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo hacer se usa para creación y resultados.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe faire sert pour la création et les résultats.

sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eu farei o jantar esta noite.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Yo haré la cena esta noche.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Je ferai le dîner ce soir.

sample_sentences.en: You will make a cake tomorrow.
He will make coffee for everyone.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il fera du café pour tout le monde.

sample_sentences.en: She will make a list before the trip.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela fará uma lista antes da viagem.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ella hará una lista antes del viaje.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle fera une liste avant le voyage.

sample_sentences.en: It will make a loud sound.
We will make a plan together.
You all will make good progress.
They will make a new website soon.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eles farão um novo site em breve.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ellos harán un nuevo sitio web pronto.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Ils feront un nouveau site bientôt.
